# SMS Campaigns Module

Module ID: sms-campaigns
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped SMS contacts, consent-aware campaign creation, scheduled dispatch, provider delivery logs, and campaign reporting.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
Important files:
- src/service/index.ts: use cases and consent/dispatch guards
- src/ports/index.ts: storage and provider ports
- src/adapters/memory.ts: in-memory store
- src/adapters/d1.ts: D1 store
- migrations/0001_initial.sql: D1 tables
Do not store raw SMS provider credentials in D1.
